WorkJournals.Title: First Week — Network Basics
WorkJournals.Content: This week I was introduced to the IT infrastructure at Swisscom. I learned the difference between LAN, WAN and WLAN. Together with my trainer Markus I set up a small test network and configured the IP addresses manually.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 2 — Helpdesk Shadowing
WorkJournals.Content: I spent Monday and Tuesday shadowing the helpdesk team. I observed how tickets are created, prioritised and resolved in ServiceNow. On Wednesday I handled my first ticket independently.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 54 — PLC Programming
WorkJournals.Content: In my second year I started working with Siemens S7-1500 PLCs. This week Sandra showed me how to write a basic ladder diagram to control a conveyor belt simulation.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 55 — Electrical Panel Wiring
WorkJournals.Content: This week I wired a control cabinet under supervision. I followed the circuit diagram exactly and double-checked every connection before powering on.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 110 — Inventory Management Project
WorkJournals.Content: Third year project week. I am leading a small team of two colleagues to analyse inventory discrepancies in the fresh produce department.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 111 — Customer Service Focus
WorkJournals.Content: This week I was assigned to the customer service desk. I handled approximately 40 customer interactions per day including returns, complaints and general inquiries.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 163 — Final Year — Client Advisory
WorkJournals.Content: Fourth and final year. This week I conducted three supervised client advisory meetings for savings products. Claudia observed and said my communication style has improved greatly.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 164 — Exam Preparation
WorkJournals.Content: This week was dedicated to preparing for the Qualifying Procedure (QV). I reviewed all mandatory competences and filled in any gaps in my portfolio.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 53 — Lab Safety & GMP Introduction
WorkJournals.Content: Second year start at Roche. We had a two-day refresher on Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) and laboratory safety regulations. I passed the mandatory safety test with 96%.

WorkJournals.Title: Week 54 — Sample Preparation
WorkJournals.Content: First practical week in the QC lab. I prepared ten reference samples according to SOP-QC-042. All ten samples were within the accepted concentration range.
